thought.text: The `emitBinary` at line 661 has no `  ` prefix (class scope). Let me fix the indentation:

reasoning_content:
The issue is clear - `emitBinary` at line 661 has no `  ` prefix, meaning it's outside the class. The class scope requires 2-space indentation. The functions are correctly indented with `  ` inside but the `void emitBinary` declaration at line 661 has no `  ` prefix.

Let me fix this by using sed to add `  ` prefix to the function declarations.

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && sed -i '661s/^void/  void/' task/5/EmitMIR.cpp && cmake --build build -t task5 2>&1 | head -10

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && sed -i '661s/^void/  void/' task/5/EmitMIR.cpp && cmake --build build -t task5 2>&1 | head -10", "summary": "Fix emitBinary indentation", "timeout": 60}
